home.name: Cristian Sanchez
home.aboutText: I am a Software Developer with experience in Full Stack Development, specializing in Java. I possess strong problem-solving and leadership skills. My focus is on creating high-quality, efficient technology solutions, and I have a constant commitment to continuous improvement and learning. I am excited to contribute to the success of any development team and face technological challenges with passion and determination.
